Best USB-C Hub for MacBook and Laptops

Updated May 2026 · Under $40

Modern laptops are too thin for useful ports. If you need to plug in a monitor, USB drive, SD card, and charger at the same time, a USB-C hub is mandatory. After testing multiple options, one 7-in-1 hub stands out for build quality and port selection.

🏆 7-in-1 USB-C Hub

  • 4K HDMI output — mirror or extend to an external monitor at 30Hz
  • 3 USB-A 3.0 ports — 5Gbps transfer speed for drives and peripherals
  • SD & microSD card slots — direct photo/video import for creators
  • 100W Power Delivery pass-through — charge laptop while using the hub
  • Aluminum unibody — matches MacBook aesthetic, dissipates heat
Check Current Price on Amazon

Why 7-in-1 is the sweet spot

Cheaper 3-in-1 hubs force you to buy a second adapter later. Overpriced 12-in-1 docks add ports you will never use and bulk that does not fit in a laptop sleeve. A 7-in-1 hub covers 95% of daily use cases while staying compact enough for travel.

Who should buy it

MacBook Air/Pro users, ultrabook owners, and anyone who connects their laptop to a monitor at home but needs portability on the road. If you own a portable monitor from our earlier review, this hub is the missing link that connects everything with one cable.

Disclosure: As an Amazon Associate I earn from qualifying purchases. This review is based on independent research and reader feedback.
